title: Update footer attribution to 'Built with ❤️ by Athira S' (italicized name)

requirements.text: In the Footer component, change the attribution text from 'Built with ❤️ using caffeine.ai' to 'Built with ❤️ by Athira S', where 'Athira S' is rendered in italic style. All other content, layout, and styling in the Footer must remain exactly as in Version 36.

quotes: Instead of "Built with ❤️ using caffeine.ai", Built with ❤️ by Athira S (Athira S in Italics)
Everything else stays exactly as it is in Version 36.

acceptanceCriteria: Footer displays 'Built with ❤️ by Athira S' where 'Athira S' is wrapped in an <em> or italic tag
No other text, layout, colors, or components in the footer are changed
The rest of the page (Navigation, Hero, About, Vision Pillars, Reunion, Survey, Stakeholder Voices, Digital Impact sections) is unchanged

constraints: Only the footer attribution text may be changed; no other modifications to any component
nonGoals: Changing any other section of the page
Updating any translations or language context strings beyond the footer attribution
